Pricing

Start free. Scale when you need more.

Simple workspace-based plans for individuals, teams and businesses. Storage, modules, AI usage and advanced permissions scale with your plan.

Free

£0 /mo
  • 1 workspace
  • 3 projects
  • 2GB storage
  • Tasks, calendar and storage
  • Basic studio review
  • CORE basic
Start free

Creator

£5.99 /mo
  • 5 workspaces
  • 25GB storage
  • Unlimited projects
  • Studio review
  • Client sharing
  • Priority CORE
Choose Creator

Studio

£12.99 /mo
  • 25 workspaces
  • 250GB storage
  • CRM and client hub
  • Reports and invoices
  • Advanced permissions
  • Automation rules
Choose Studio

Business

£24.99 /mo
  • Unlimited workspaces
  • 1TB storage fair use
  • Advanced AI
  • Audit logs
  • Team roles
  • Priority support
Contact sales

Annual discount

Annual plans should include a discount once billing is live. Referral and invite codes can also be used for workspace-specific access, guest onboarding and launch promotions.

Workspace limits

Limits should be generous enough that people do not feel blocked, while storage, AI, reporting and advanced controls become paid upgrades.

© CSorro OSHome
